name: beads-git-graph
description: Independent VS Code Git graph extension with Beads support, based on the last MIT commit of Git Graph.

scripts.compile: pnpm run clean && pnpm run compile-src && pnpm run compile-web
scripts.package-and-install: pnpm run clean && vsce package && node ./.vscode/install-package.js

neo-git-graph.autoCenterCommitDetailsVie.description: Automatically center the commit details view when it is opened.

enumDescriptions: Show the date and time, for example "19 Mar 2019 21:34"
Show the date only, for example "19 Mar 2019"
Show relative times, for example "5 minutes ago"
neo-git-graph.dateFormat.description: Specifies the date format to be used in the date column of Git Graph.

enumDescriptions: Use the author date of a commit
Use the committer date of a commit
neo-git-graph.dateType.description: Specifies the date type to be displayed throughout Git Graph.

viewDiff.description: Show "View Diff" in the commit details file context menu.

viewDiffWithWorkingFile.description: Show "View Diff with Working File" in the commit details file context menu.

viewFileAtRevision.description: Show "View File at this Revision" in the commit details file context menu.

openFile.description: Show "Open File" in the commit details file context menu.

resetFileToRevision.description: Show "Reset File to this Revision..." in the commit details file context menu.

copyRelativeFilePath.description: Show "Copy Relative File Path to Clipboard" in the commit details file context menu.

copyAbsoluteFilePath.description: Show "Copy Absolute File Path to Clipboard" in the commit details file context menu.

neo-git-graph.commitDetailsFileActionVis.description: Controls visibility of actions in the commit details file context menu.

neo-git-graph.enhancedAccessibility.description: Enable enhanced accessibility rendering, including showing file change type indicators (A, M, D, R, U) in commit details.

neo-git-graph.fetchAvatars.description: Fetch avatars of commit authors and committers. By enabling this setting, you consent to commit author and committer email addresses being sent GitHub, GitLab or Gravatar, depending on the repositories remote origin.

neo-git-graph.graphColours.description: Specifies the colours used on the graph.

enumDescriptions: Use smooth curves when transitioning between branches on the graph
Use angular lines when transitioning between branches on the graph
neo-git-graph.graphStyle.description: Specifies the style of the graph.

neo-git-graph.initialLoadCommits.description: Specifies the number of commits to initially load.

neo-git-graph.loadMoreCommits.description: Specifies the number of commits to load when the "Load More Commits" button is pressed (only shown when more commits are available).

neo-git-graph.referenceInputSpaceSubstit.description: Specifies how spaces are substituted in reference-name dialog inputs (for example, Create Branch and Add Tag).

neo-git-graph.maxDepthOfRepoSearch.description: Specifies the maximum depth of subfolders to search when discovering repositories in the workspace.

enumDescriptions: Sort repositories by full workspace path.
Sort repositories by repository folder name.
neo-git-graph.repoDropdownOrder.description: Specifies how repositories are sorted in the repository dropdown.

neo-git-graph.showCurrentBranchByDefault.description: Show the current branch by default when Git Graph is opened. Default: false (show all branches)

neo-git-graph.showStatusBarItem.description: Show a Status Bar item which opens Git Graph when clicked.

neo-git-graph.showUncommittedChanges.description: Show uncommitted changes (set to false to decrease load time on large repositories).

enumDescriptions: Show a colour icon which suits most Visual Studio Code colour themes
Show a grey icon which suits Visual Studio Code colour themes that are predominantly grayscale
neo-git-graph.tabIconColourTheme.description: Specifies the colour theme of the icon displayed on the Git Graph tab.
